commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Convex migrations-component backfill that estimates historical skill installs from aggregate daily stats, patches skill all-time install counters, stores an installBackfill audit object, and refreshes skill search digests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is an administrative production data backfill rather than a bug report. The relevant behavior is source-reviewable through the migration path and current publisher stat readers.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow repair path for aggregate consistency and durable docs, while final approval of the estimate model remains a maintainer decision.

target.title: Add skill install backfill migration
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds a privacy-preserving one-time skill install backfill model based only on aggregate `skillDailyStats` and all-time download counts.
- Adds a Convex migrations-component migration that bumps `statsInstallsAllTime` and syncs `skillSearchDigest` for affected skills.
- Stores an `installBackfill` audit object on bumped skill rows with the model version, clean-window counts, rate inputs, previous installs, target installs, and bump amount.

## Migration Strategy
- Clean install window: `2026-06-12` through `2026-06-18` UTC, the first clean install-telemetry period after the old `clawhub sync` signal was excluded.
- Global clean rate: `407 installs / 10,777 downloads = 3.78%`.
- Per-skill rate: smoothed with `priorDownloads = 1000`, minimum clean downloads `100`, and capped at `10%`.
- Estimated all-time installs: `all_time_downloads * smoothed_rate`.
- Applied bump: `max(0, estimated_all_time_installs - current_statsInstallsAllTime)`.

This does not read user-level install rows, dedupe rows, IP hashes, or private telemetry.

## Backfill Logic
| Stage | Logic | Effect |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Inputs | Read all-time downloads and current all-time installs from the canonical skill stat fields. Sum only aggregate `skillDailyStats.downloads` and `skillDailyStats.installs` for days `20616..20622`. | Uses skill-level totals only; no user/device/session-level data is queried. |
| Global fallback | `global_clean_rate = 407 / 10,777 = 3.78%`. | Gives sparse skills a neutral baseline from the clean telemetry period. |
| Per-skill rate | If clean-window downloads are at least `100`, use `(clean_installs + global_clean_rate * 1000) / (clean_downloads + 1000)`. Otherwise use the global clean rate. | Skills with enough recent data can move above or below global, but the `1000` download prior prevents a tiny clean window from dominating old downloads. |
| Cap | `smoothed_rate = min(10%, per_skill_rate)`. | Prevents an extreme clean-window ratio from creating an outsized historical bump. |
| Target | `estimated = round(all_time_downloads * smoothed_rate)`, then `target = max(current_all_time_installs, estimated)`. | Backfill can only raise install totals; it never lowers a skill that already has more installs than the estimate. |
| Write | Patch both `statsInstallsAllTime` and `stats.installsAllTime`, store the `installBackfill` audit object, then sync `skillSearchDigest`. | Keeps migrated stat fields and search/ranking digest in sync. |
| Idempotency | Skip when the estimated bump is `0`, or when the same model version and target have already been applied. | Safe to dry-run and safe to avoid double-applying the same estimate. |
| Operator guard | The runner dry-runs by default. Applying requires `confirm="apply-skill-install-backfill"` and runs through `@convex-dev/migrations`. | Gives operators preview, batching, resume tracking, and an explicit apply step. |

## Expected Impact

These numbers use the production aggregate snapshot used to choose the model. The production apply will recompute from live `skills` and `skillDailyStats` rows at run time.

| Skill | Clean-window downloads | Clean-window installs | Raw clean rate | Smoothed rate | Current all-time installs | Expected all-time installs | Expected bump |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| `self-improving-agent` | 2,189 | 84 | 3.84% | 3.82% | 6,926 | 17,648 | +10,722 |
| `skill-vetter` | 1,641 | 76 | 4.63% | 4.31% | 4,679 | 11,142 | +6,463 |
| `github` | 1,078 | 44 | 4.08% | 3.93% | 4,500 | 7,500 | +3,000 |
| `ontology` | 781 | 29 | 3.71% | 3.75% | 1,420 | 7,115 | +5,695 |
| `proactive-agent` | 903 | 42 | 4.65% | 4.19% | 3,047 | 7,099 | +4,052 |
| `self-improving` | 1,124 | 37 | 3.29% | 3.52% | 2,205 | 7,036 | +4,831 |
| `weather` | 844 | 36 | 4.27% | 4.00% | 3,892 | 6,446 | +2,554 |
| `skillscan` | 245 | 4 | 1.63% | 3.35% | 17 | 5,978 | +5,961 |
| `gog` | 871 | 19 | 2.18% | 3.03% | 3,664 | 5,654 | +1,990 |
| `multi-search-engine` | 1,101 | 36 | 3.27% | 3.51% | 2,176 | 5,393 | +3,217 |

Expected top order by all-time installs after this one-time estimate: `self-improving-agent`, `skill-vetter`, `github`, `ontology`, `proactive-agent`, `self-improving`, `weather`, `skillscan`, `gog`, `multi-search-engine`.

## Operator Flow
| Step | Command | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Dry run | `bunx convex run migrations:runSkillInstallBackfill '{"dryRun":true}'` | Runs one tracked dry-run batch and returns the model config plus `confirmRequired`. |
| Apply | `bunx convex run migrations:runSkillInstallBackfill '{"dryRun":false,"confirm":"apply-skill-install-backfill"}'` | Runs the migration to completion through `@convex-dev/migrations`. |

Before production apply, create a manual Convex dashboard backup for the target deployment and confirm it completed.

## Proof
| Evidence | Claim Proved | Result |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Backfill logic table | Reviewers can trace how aggregate clean-window stats become the final install bump. | Included above |
| Expected impact table | Reviewers can see the intended ranking and install-count shape before production apply. | Included above |
| `convex/lib/skillInstallBackfill.test.ts` | Skillscan-style low clean-window conversion gets historical credit, while ontology-style higher clean conversion ranks higher. Tiny clean windows fall back to the global rate. Existing higher install totals are not lowered. | Passed |
| `convex/migrations.test.ts` | The runner defaults to dry-run and requires `confirm="apply-skill-install-backfill"` before apply. | Passed |
| Dev Convex dry run | The new internal action is callable through Convex and returns the expected clean-window model config. | Passed |
| `@convex-dev/migrations` | Backfill is tracked, batched, resumable, and dry-runnable. | Used by `backfillSkillInstallEstimates` |

## Verification
```text
bun run test convex/lib/skillInstallBackfill.test.ts convex/migrations.test.ts
# 2 files passed, 11 tests passed

bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
# passed

bunx convex dev --once --typecheck=disable
# Convex functions ready

bunx convex run migrations:runSkillInstallBackfill '{"dryRun":true}'
# returned ok=true, dryRun=true, confirmRequired="apply-skill-install-backfill"

bun run ci:static
# passed

bun run ci:unit
# 282 files passed, 3600 tests passed, coverage thresholds met

.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --engine claude --model claude-sonnet-4-6
# clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
```
target.author: jesse-merhi

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
